nodes.name: Paramo seedeater
nodes.summary: The paramo seedeater (Catamenia homochroa) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. Distribution and habitat It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland, and heavily degraded former forest. References

nodes.summary: Catamenia（Catamenia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Band-tailed seedeater、Plain-colored seedeater、Paramo seedeater。
